title: Applied Maths for AI
scope: Vectors, embeddings, probability, statistics and Applied Maths Lab. Intuition only — no proofs, no NumPy.

assessments.title: AI Systems Essay
assessments.requirement: Write a 500-word structured essay on one AI success case and one AI failure case. For the failure, identify the root cause at a technical level — data bias, model architecture, prompt design, or deployment error. Propose a concrete mitigation referencing the 2026 AI stack. Submit as PDF. Graded on: technical accuracy of root cause, quality of mitigation, argument structure.
